revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-2

Accreditation is the formal endorsement by a competent authority that a training organization operates under a quality management system to deliver effective training.  

Source: IALA Guideline G1014 


(VTS33/output/8 refers)
